homeSeo.howToChoose: How to Choose a Baby Name
homeSeo.howToChooseP1: Choosing a baby name is one of the most meaningful decisions parents make. The right name shapes your child's sense of identity, influences social interactions, and strengthens family bonds.
homeSeo.howToChooseP2: Key criteria when choosing a name: meaning (the significance will accompany your child for life), ease of pronunciation (should be easy to say in various cultural contexts), surname harmony (syllable count and sound flow matter), and cultural context (should align with family values).
homeSeo.howToChooseP3: NamePick helps you evaluate all these criteria with interactive tools. Our surname harmony analysis scores across 7 phonetic criteria; our name comparison tool shows two names side by side.
homeSeo.testimonial: We found our daughter's name using NamePick's surname harmony tool. Sophia Williams — 89 points!
homeSeo.faqCount: How many names does NamePick have?
homeSeo.faqCountA: NamePick currently has 643+ names in its database. Meanings, origins, and popularity data are available in 4 languages: Turkish, English, German, and Arabic.
homeSeo.faqHarmony: How does the surname harmony analysis work?
homeSeo.faqHarmonyA: The surname harmony analysis evaluates phonetic compatibility between a first name and surname across 7 criteria: syllable harmony, letter transition, vowel balance, rhythm analysis, letter repetition, phonetic flow, and total length.
homeSeo.faqFreeA: Yes, NamePick is completely free. Name search, filtering, surname harmony test, name comparison, and all other tools are available at no cost. No registration required.
homeSeo.faqSource: Where does the name data come from?
homeSeo.faqSourceA: Name data is compiled from SSA (US Social Security Administration) baby name records, BehindTheName etymological database, TÜİK (Turkish Statistical Institute) population statistics, and academic onomastic research.
